---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
---
```{=html}
<!-- Three.js Library -->
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r134/three.min.js"></script>

<!-- WebGL Background Canvas -->
<canvas id="bg-canvas" style="position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; z-index: -1; width: 100vw; height: 100vh;"></canvas>

<!-- Main Container -->
<div class="container" style="padding: 0 2rem 4rem 2rem; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; min-height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;">
  
  <div class="hero-section">
    <h1 class="hero-title">Hello, I'm <span class="hero-highlight">Lemon</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">Exploring Information Theory, Machine Learning, and beyond.</p>
  </div>

</div>

<script src="/assets/bg-contour.js"></script>
```
